articles.title: Wimbledon experts' picks: Who will win? - ESPN
articles.description: Could an American take the women's Wimbledon title? Can anyone beat Sinner? Or could Djokovic pull off the improbable? Our experts make predictions.
articles.content:
Jun 28, 2026, 01:48 PM ET
Wimbledon kicks off Monday, with defending champions Jannik Sinner and Iga Swiatek in the field. With Carlos Alcaraz out of the tournament with injury, could Sinner pull of… [+13545 chars]
